name: pcm-mcp-server
description: MCP server for querying and editing Pro Cycling Manager game databases
long_description: MCP server for querying and editing Pro Cycling Manager game databases. This server provides tools to discover, inspect and query PCM database files via the MCP protocol, allowing AI assistants to explore your saves in a structured way. Write tools never modify the source save: edits are always serialized to a new .cdb file, and existing files are never overwritten.
